    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    04/08

    1. s41467-026-71611-9 Metasurface-enhanced mid-infrared imaging spectroscopy with broadband quantum cascade lasers (Nature Communications)

    2. s41467-026-71647-x Regulating interface electric field to stabilize high-voltage KVPO4F positive electrode for sustainable potassium-ion batteries (Nature Communications)
